title: senecio gunckelii
intro: Senecio gunckelii, also known as Gum Web, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. In herbal preparations, Senecio gunckelii is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
